testcase.name: Authentication E2E Tests - Login Flow › should successfully login with valid email and password
Authentication E2E Tests - Login Flow › should show error for invalid email format
Authentication E2E Tests - Login Flow › should show error for non-existent email
Authentication E2E Tests - Login Flow › should show error for incorrect password
Authentication E2E Tests - Login Flow › should display all social login options
Authentication E2E Tests - Login Flow › should handle empty email submission
Authentication E2E Tests - Login Flow › should handle empty password submission
Authentication E2E Tests - Login Flow › should show forgot password option
Authentication E2E Tests - Logout Flow › should successfully logout after login
Authentication E2E Tests - Logout Flow › should clear authentication tokens after logout
Authentication E2E Tests - Logout Flow › should require login after logout to access protected pages
Authentication E2E Tests - Password Reset Flow › should navigate to password reset page
Authentication E2E Tests - Password Reset Flow › should request password reset for valid email

failure.message: auth-password-reset.spec.ts:48:7 should request password reset for valid email

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth\auth-password-reset.spec.ts:48:7 › Authentication E2E Tests - Password Reset Flow › should request password reset for valid email
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: page.textContent: Target page, context or browser has been closed
82 | // Check for success message - could be various formats 83 | const successMessage = page.getByText(/sent|check your email|reset link|instructions|email has been sent|we've sent/i); > 84 | const pageText = await page.textContent('body') || ''; | ^ 85 | const hasSuccess = /sent|check your email|reset link|instructions|email has been sent|we've sent/i.test(pageText); 86 | 87 | // Check if form is still visible at C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\mereka-frontend-workspace-v2\tests\e2e-test\tests\auth\auth-password-reset.spec.ts:84:37

testcase.name: Authentication E2E Tests - Password Reset Flow › should show error for invalid email format in password reset
Authentication E2E Tests - Password Reset Flow › should handle password reset for non-existent email gracefully

failure.message: auth-password-reset.spec.ts:155:7 should handle password reset for non-existent email gracefully

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth\auth-password-reset.spec.ts:155:7 › Authentication E2E Tests - Password Reset Flow › should handle password reset for non-existent email gracefully
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: page.textContent: Target page, context or browser has been closed

testcase.name: Authentication E2E Tests - Password Reset Flow › should allow navigation back from password reset
Authentication E2E Tests - Registration Flow › should navigate to registration page
Authentication E2E Tests - Registration Flow › should show registration form fields
Authentication E2E Tests - Registration Flow › should validate email format during registration
Authentication E2E Tests - Registration Flow › should validate password strength during registration
Authentication E2E Tests - Registration Flow › should prevent registration with duplicate email
Physical Experience Creation › should navigate to experience creation page after login
testcase.system-out: 🔐 Starting login flow... ✅ Login link clicked ✅ Login successful 🔍 Looking for hub dashboard or experience creation link... ✅ Found navigation path: Post a Job ✅ Navigated to: https://v2.mereka.dev/ 📋 Current URL: https://v2.mereka.dev/ ⚠️ May not be on experience creation page ℹ️ Test may need adjustment based on actual v2 navigation structure

testcase.name: Physical Experience Creation › should verify experience creation page elements are accessible
testcase.system-out: 🔐 Starting login flow... ✅ Login successful ✅ User menu found - logged in successfully

testcase.name: Home to Experience Redirection Flow › should successfully navigate to experience detail page after login
testcase.system-out: Starting login flow with valid credentials... ✅ Login link clicked ✅ Login successful ✅ Navigated to homepage ✅ Upcoming Experiences section verified ✅ Clicked on first experience card ✅ Successfully navigated to experience detail page ✅ Current URL: https://v2.mereka.dev/experience/dsadasd3

testcase.name: Home to Experience Redirection Flow › should navigate to experience detail page without login
testcase.system-out: Testing experience navigation without login... ✅ Navigated to homepage ✅ Upcoming Experiences section verified ✅ Clicked on first experience card ✅ Successfully navigated to experience detail page ✅ Current URL: https://v2.mereka.dev/experience/dsadasd3

testcase.name: Home Page Elements › should display all key elements in a single flow

failure.message: home-page-elements.spec.ts:11:7 should display all key elements in a single flow

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › home\home-page-elements.spec.ts:11:7 › Home Page Elements › should display all key elements in a single flow
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /.*\/jobs/ Received string: "https://v2.mereka.dev/" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://v2.mereka.dev/"
at ..\fixtures\home-page.ts:218
216 | await expect(this.viewAllJobsLink).toBeVisible(); 217 | await this.viewAllJobsLink.click(); > 218 | await expect(this.page).toHaveURL(/.*\/jobs/); | ^ 219 | } 220 | 221 | /** at HomePage.clickViewAllJobs (C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\mereka-frontend-workspace-v2\tests\e2e-test\fixtures\home-page.ts:218:29) at C:\Users\ASUS\Documents\mereka-frontend-workspace-v2\tests\e2e-test\tests\home\home-page-elements.spec.ts:105:5

testcase.system-out:
✅ Hero section verified ✅ Featured Experts section verified ✅ Found 4 expert cards ✅ View all Experts navigation verified ✅ Featured Hubs section verified ✅ Found 4 hub cards ✅ View all Hubs navigation verified ✅ Browse Expertise section verified ✅ Found 3 expertise cards ✅ Expertise card price element verified ✅ View all Expertise navigation verified ✅ Upcoming Experiences section verified ✅ Found 3 experience cards ✅ Experience card elements verified ✅ View all Experiences navigation verified ✅ Latest Jobs section verified ℹ️ No job cards found (may be empty)
